demographic_profile.summary: Enterprise power users and technology decision-makers who actively seek early access to new software features and tools to maintain competitive advantages. They are motivated by being first-to-market with new capabilities and having input into product development cycles. They are frustrated by slow enterprise software release cycles and limited influence over vendor product roadmaps.
